name: lamp-os-root
description: Root package for Lamp OS project

scripts.lamp:buildfs: npm run ui:build && cd software/lamp-os && pio run -t buildfs
scripts.lamp:flashfs: npm run ui:build && cd software/lamp-os && pio run -t uploadfs
scripts.lamp:flash: cd software/lamp-os && LAMP_FIRMWARE_CHANNEL=${CHANNEL:-beta} pio run -e upesy_wroom_${VARIANT:-standard} -t upload${PORT:+ --upload-port "$PORT"}
scripts.lamp:monitor: cd software/lamp-os && pio device monitor -e upesy_wroom_standard
scripts.wisp:flash: cd software/wisp && pio run -e seeed_xiao_esp32_c6 -t upload
scripts.wisp:monitor: cd software/wisp && pio device monitor -e seeed_xiao_esp32_c6
scripts.app:install: cd software/lamp-app-flutter && DEV=$(./scripts/android-id.sh) && flutter build apk --debug && adb -s $DEV install -r build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-debug.apk && adb -s $DEV shell monkey -p ca.lamplit.lamp_app -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 > /dev/null
scripts.app:launch: cd software/lamp-app-flutter && DEV=$(./scripts/android-id.sh) && adb -s $DEV shell monkey -p ca.lamplit.lamp_app -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 > /dev/null
scripts.app:codegen: cd software/lamp-app-flutter && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
scripts.app:watch: cd software/lamp-app-flutter && dart run build_runner watch --delete-conflicting-outputs
scripts.app:clean: cd software/lamp-app-flutter && flutter clean && flutter pub get && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
